questionEN: A developer needs to find compiler errors quickly. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да намери compiler errors бързо. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Issue navigator събира build errors и warnings.
explanationEN: Issue navigator is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to pause execution on a line. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да pause-не execution на ред. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Breakpoint спира program execution за inspection.
explanationEN: Breakpoint is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to type debugger commands. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пише debugger commands. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: LLDB е debugger конзолата зад Xcode debugging.
explanationEN: LLDB is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to read print output. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да прочете print output. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Console показва logs и runtime output.
explanationEN: Console is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to inspect variables while paused. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да inspect-не variables при pause. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Debug area показва variables, stack и console.
explanationEN: Debug area is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to inspect SwiftUI/UIKit hierarchy. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да inspect-не SwiftUI/UIKit hierarchy. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: View debugger показва визуалната hierarchy runtime.
explanationEN: View debugger is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to find retained objects. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да намери retained objects. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Memory graph помага за leaks и reference cycles.
explanationEN: Memory graph is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to profile performance. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да профилира performance. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Instruments измерва CPU, memory, leaks и responsiveness.
explanationEN: Instruments is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to choose app plus configuration. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избере app плюс configuration. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Scheme определя target, run/test actions и configuration.
explanationEN: Scheme is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to define a buildable product. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да дефинира buildable product. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Target описва product, sources, resources и build settings.
explanationEN: Target is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to change deployment target. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да промени deployment target. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Build settings съдържат compiler и packaging configuration.
explanationEN: Build settings is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to fix stale build artifacts. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да оправи stale build artifacts. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Clean Build Folder премахва build outputs за fresh rebuild.
explanationEN: Clean Build Folder is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to clear generated build cache. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изчисти generated build cache. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: DerivedData пази build cache, indexes и intermediates.
explanationEN: DerivedData is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to see device runtime messages. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да види device runtime messages. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Simulator logs помагат при runtime и system-level debugging.
explanationEN: Simulator logs is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to catch data races. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да хване data races. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Thread sanitizer открива unsafe concurrent access.
explanationEN: Thread sanitizer is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to catch UI work off main thread. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да хване UI work извън main thread. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Main Thread Checker предупреждава за UI updates off main.
explanationEN: Main Thread Checker is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to verify code behavior automatically. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да провери code behavior автоматично. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Unit tests проверяват logic без ръчно тестване.
explanationEN: Unit tests is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to run and inspect tests. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да стартира и inspect-не tests. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Test navigator показва test suites и results.
explanationEN: Test navigator is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to debug broken SwiftUI previews. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да debug-не broken SwiftUI previews. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Preview diagnostics помага при preview build/runtime errors.
explanationEN: Preview diagnostics is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to read a production crash. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да прочете production crash. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Symbolicated crash log превежда addresses към functions и lines.
explanationEN: Symbolicated crash log is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to stop when an exception is thrown. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да спре при thrown exception. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Exception breakpoint спира точно при exception source.
explanationEN: Exception breakpoint is the best fit here because it directly supports the described Xcode & Debugging workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to find compiler errors practically. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да намери compiler errors практичено. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Issue navigator събира build errors и warnings.
